title: Satori’s Ordeal Begins
description: The Straw Hats fight back against Satori’s tricks, turning confusion and panic into a direct counterattack.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Satori, Eneru, Luffy, Narrator, Usopp. The Straw Hats fight back against Satori’s tricks, turning confusion and panic into a direct counterattack.

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: You said two "sounds" became silent. Correct?

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: GAN FALL DIDN'T BEAT THE PRIEST!!

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: So you have to be careful.

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: Luffy! Sanji ~!! I found the boat!

dialogue.speaker: Satori
dialogue.text: Hurry----!!! It'll leave the forest soon--!!!

dialogue.speaker: Eneru
dialogue.text: It seems that guy is alright.

dialogue.speaker: Wyper
dialogue.text: You're Not Running Away From Me!! Karasu-Maru!

summary: The Straw Hats fight back against Satori’s tricks, turning confusion and panic into a direct counterattack.
